entry.title: Re: cor6n/co11n bug buttons overlay material description

Dear janbuchmann,

I had been searching for such a note with various keys but never managed to find it! Thank you a lot!

entry.title: Re: Table/FM to get change log of configured material cha...
entry.content:
Hello @Suryansh_jain 

Change documents are stored in CDHDR and CDPOS tables. See SAP Help Read and Edit Change Documents

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Check if a Material is batch managed
entry.content:
Hello @Ricardofs 

You can read material batch management indicators with BPAI_MATERIAL_GET_ALL function.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Introduction
entry.content:
@Matt_Darke - thank you for introducing yourself here! 
You're welcome to connect with our current SAP Champions as well. You can also meet our new SAP Champions announced recently. Feel free to reach out to these community leaders!

entry.title: Re: SAP
entry.content: Welcome @SUDERESAN23 - thank you for joining SAP Community. I would recommend that you join the SAP Learning group, and ask your question there - the colleagues there can give you some great advice!

entry.title: Re: SAP BI 4.3 SP4: What’s New In Web Intelligence and Semantic Layer
entry.content:
Hello Christian,

a great blog article. Many thanks to you.

I'm looking for to see you tommorow and find out the new features of the BO 2025 version.

 

Kind regards

Migel

entry.title: Re: SAP Captcha in SAP CDC - Gigya
entry.content:
Hi @S_Sarkar 

SAP CAPTCHA in SAP Customer Data Cloud (formerly Gigya) is part of the core offering, so there’s no separate charge for enabling this feature. It's available to all existing customers using SAP CDC, so you won’t need to pay an extra fee for it.

As for notifying SAP, there's no need to submit a support ticket just to enable the CAPTCHA. You can simply enable it through the CDC console as needed. A support ticket would only be necessary if you encounter any issues with the feature or need additional help troubleshooting or configuring it.

hope this is helpful.

Regards,
Anand Raj

entry.title: Re: Health Monitoring with Cloud ALM - Custom Metrics for S/4 HANA private cloud Part 1 (Postman)
entry.content:
Hi,

Here is my request body for the example:

{
    "resourceMetrics": [
        {
            "resource": {
                "attributes": [
                    {
                        "key": "service.name",
                        "value": {
                            "stringValue": "SID400"
                        }
                    }
                ]
            },
            "scopeMetrics": [
                {
                    "scope": {
                        "name": "HM_ANALYTICS_DP",
                        "version": "V1"
                    },
                    "metrics": [
                        {
                            "name": "Custom.SM13.Errors",
                            "description": "SM13 Update Requests with Errors",
                            "gauge": {
                                "dataPoints": [
                                    {
                                        "timeUnixNano": "{{CURRENT_TIMESTAMP_NANO}}",
                                        "asDouble": 5.0,
                                        "attributes": [
                                            {
                                                "key": "Client",
                                                "value": {
                                                    "stringValue": "400"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            {
                                                "key": "Instance",
                                                "value": {
                                                    "stringValue": "hostname_SID_00"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            {
                                                "key": "Sid",
                                                "value": {
                                                    "stringValue": "SID"
                                                }
                                            }
                                        ]
                                    }
                                ]
                            }
                        }
                    ]
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
}
 
What do you need to help?

entry.title: Re: SAP API Management - Set Basic Authentication for API Proxy in Integration Suite
entry.content: Thank you for sharing your insights on this topic.

entry.title: The description field does not display any content.
entry.content:
Dear Experts 

I have created a New DB Throw Solution packager  and my version is 10  FB 2111

but after DB working I face an issue regarding the Description field in the  Production Order and Bill of Material (BoM) fields within our SAP system. Specifically, the Description field does not display any content

Although it appears on other screens Like PO,SO, ....etc

Can anyone help me to solve this issue 

I attached a screenshot of the issue ..

Regards

entry.title: ALV Tress is collapsing or unexpended after selecting any checkbox.
entry.content: I have a problem in ALV_TREE's display. Initially, after doing some process, I will get screen which contains an ALV tree that contains a checkbox and tree is expanded. When I am selecting any checkbox, then the respective children are getting collapsed or tree is unexpanded. What can be the reason? How can I avoid the collapse of a tree after selecting any checkbox, or where can I look for this collapse functionality??

entry.title: Re: Chemical Vs. Material in EHS S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Ali, 

If you want to be able to use the process of waste management, you need to have the waste material created as usual. In case you want to make use of the risk assessment of the chemical for process purposes with your client,t all you need to do is

1. Create the necessary data (waste material)

2. Change to chemicals

3 Go to the chemical that responds to the waste material 

4. Assign the material to the chemical

5. You can proceed with the risk assessment of the chemical

6 you can proceed with the usual waste management process.

Its important to mention that you will have an indication of the risk assessment of the chemical within the Chemical management application, but if you switch to Waste material, there you will not see the risk assessment

entry.title: Re: Passing values in Input Parameters - Variables of Datasphere Model from Power BI
entry.content: Now, Analytic model can be read as well with open sql user created in space. @albertosimeoni

entry.title: Re: Enhance RAP Applications: Dynamically Generate YouTube Thumbnails Using Virtual Elements

entry.title: Re: The Next Generation Intercompany Solution: Intercompany Matching & Reconciliation
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Point no-1)Did anyone cater the TDS scenario in ICMR. AP transaction is posted with 98(Amount(100) - TDS(2)), whereas AR is posted with total amount(100). So in this case if my matching expression has Leading transaction currency =Partner transaction currency system will not matched the transaction , it will come as unreconciled after matching run.

 

Point no-2)Also after scheduling matching run- status is showing as scheduled after multiple refresh, system is not generating result & log.

entry.title: Re: how to update table: DMS_PHIO2FILE and field name: FI...
entry.content: its a requirement. I'm not sure which bapi works, it could be BAPI_DOCUMENT_CHANGE2

entry.title: Re: Efficient ways to shared SAP HANA Cloud HANA Database...
entry.content: Yes, for PROD, we prefered to have a separated instance. This way, we are able to test HANA Cloud upgrades first on non-prod before doing them on prod.

entry.title: Re: Why I am not able to see the Branch Section in my ABA...
entry.content: You may access an ABAP system by http. It's what the abapGitServer is about.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Manual Bank Reconciliation Configuration
entry.content: IMHO second link requires S-id (works for me)

entry.title: Re: Invoice before doing a good issue in S4
entry.content: Yes that standard routine will take care of your requirement

entry.title: Updated Stay Certified available for SAP Sales Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
Hello learners!

On behalf of the SAP CX Product Learning team, I am pleased to inform you about the release of our SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 Stay Certified Assessment.

SAP Stay Certified provides you the opportunity to familiarize yourself with the latest updates and product changes and keep your certification valid. This Stay Certified program contains 

  • Webinar recording: SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 - Generative AI & Machine Learning - This material will help you learn about the recent enhancements in SAP Sales Cloud V2 to prepare for the assessment and stay certified.
  • A live session scheduled for May 15th 2025, another option provided as preparation material.
  • An assessment which checks your knowledge on the latest features. 

Please Note:

1. Stay Certified is accessible only to those who have been Certified on SAP Sales Cloud Version 2. If you haven't obtained your certification, please so do here:  https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-implementation-consultant-sap-sales-cloud-version-2 

2. You will need an SAP Learning Hub  subscription to access Stay Certified as well as Certification.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Release News 2408 – External Entities
entry.content:
Hi @FlaviuBodea 

Currently, external entities are available in Cloud systems only and they can be used to connect to other public Cloud systems - SAP S/4HANA Cloud, SAP BTP ABAP environment, or SAP HANA Cloud.

The feature will most likely be available with the next big on premise shipment 2025.

Does that answer your question?

entry.title: Flush method is sap mdg fpm
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have used the custom uibb in MDG-C where i have a doubt as below.

When we create the Change request for Change Process, is the below code is really required as there will not be any change when the user click on the "Create Change Request" button. Kindly confirm me the same.

Consider performance, felt like to keep additional logic to skip below code when user click create CR button. Thanks

    CALL METHOD super->if_fpm_guibb_list~flush
      EXPORTING
        it_change_log   = it_change_log
        it_data         = it_data
        iv_old_lead_sel = iv_old_lead_sel
        iv_new_lead_sel = iv_new_lead_sel.

Regards,

KArthik S

entry.title: Re: SAP Build and SAP Build Code: Comprehensive Tools for Novice to Expert Developers
entry.content:
Thanks @PierreCol for the information. That really helps, and those links you shared, especially the learning journey are very useful as I am tasked to prepare a case for our executive committee about BTP services and benefits.

Very much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: HANA CDS views using Visual Studio Code app by connec...
entry.content:
.hdbcds files are deprecated (see Moving From .hdbcds To .hdbtable | capire )
If you want to create .cds files on top of existing tables, you should use the annotation @CDS.persistence.exists (see Configure an SAP CAP Application to Work with Native SAP HANA Artifacts | SAP Help Portal )

entry.title: FTP CPI Connectivity failed: SOCKS5 command failed with status: FORBIDDEN
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I’m setting up connectivity from SAP CPI to a local FTP server. The TCP connection from the Cloud Connector to the FTP server is working, and the connection is reachable.
The connectivity test from SAP CPI succeeds when "Check Directory Access" is off, but when enabled, I get the error: java.net.SocketException: SOCKS5 command failed with status: FORBIDDEN.

Similarly, when pushing a file through CPI interface, I receive:
org.apache.camel.component.file.GenericFileOperationFailedException: File operation failed: 229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||65087|) SOCKS5 command failed with status: FORBIDDEN.

I checked SAP Note 0003076681, which mentions ensuring passive mode is enabled and configuring the data port range. The FTP admin confirmed passive mode is enabled but couldn’t share the port range. I’ve only configured port 20 in the Cloud Connector, without a port range. What could be the issue? Do I need to configure a port range, or is there something else required?

Thanks and Regards,

Mohit

entry.title: How to retrieve quote in XML format in SAP CPQ Quote 2.0
entry.content:
Hello, experts!

In Quote 1.0, we had the chance of using the method Quote.GetQuoteInXML() in order to retrieve all quote information in XML format. We needed it for some of the requirements of several of our client's projects.

Anyone know if some simmilar method exists in Quote 2.0? We are thinking of migrate one of the tenants of our client, but we need to know if this is possible.

Thanks in advance!

Cheers,

Victor.

entry.title: IPS Trasformation add Org Member Roles
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to read users from the SAP IAS and automatically assign Org Members via IPS SAP BTP Type Platform Members (Cloud Foundry).
I have made the configuration.
https://help.sap.com/docs/identity-provisioning/identity-provisioning/sap-btp-platform-members-cloud-foundry-f5cefa9509d64b0a8aeab24a895feec5
With the default transformation I get the following error
group:b499810c-3102-4a73-84ae-7aa78c97e542,
system=MyTargetSystem,
time=2025-01-28T12:31:00.382+00,
error=Unable to write entity to target system with name rd-tgt-btp-rs-u-cloudfoundry-Administrator Caused by: An unparsed group id must have exactly 2 or 3 logical parts,
content={“displayName”:“Org Manager”,“members”:[{“$ref”:“https://myhost.accounts.ondemand.com/scim/Users/50c58b3b-347c-4ae0-8c7f-86a9b50780c2”,“type”:“User”,“value”:“50c58b3b-347c-4ae0-8c7f-86a9b50780c2”}],“urn:sap☁️scim:schemas:extension:custom:2.0:Group”:{“name”:“org_manager”}}
I think it is missing
//the organization group extension name follows the pattern: <org_ID> <org_role>
But I don't understand how to insert this into the transformation.
Greetings Dirk

entry.title: Re: how to update table: DMS_PHIO2FILE and field name: FI...
entry.content: Actually both change BAPI FMs carry the field, just test it. (Is the CHANGE2 BAPI released in your version)

entry.title: Re: Cloud Manual Bank Reconciliation Configuration
entry.content: Sorry We couldn't find that page. - Can you please share here?

entry.title: How to tackle code adaptations for S/4HANA for IS-Health components?
entry.content:
Hi All!

I'm well aware that my question is rather wide but this is due to the "simplification" item for IS-Health impacting various different object types. I became aware about this fun item way back in 2019 when I ran a first S/4HANA readiness check on our systems. Some of the items flagged in our Z-code are fairly easy to correct but for some others, I'm not quite sure what an alternative in S/4HANA could be.

My hope is, that some of you have already gone through this "exercise" and can suggest some fixes we could apply in our code. I'm especially interested in these issues:

No longer available message classes --> "copy" to Z-messages or using another SAP-provided message class saying the same thing (but hopefully in a very basic class)? We use at least these messages:

  • MESSAGE i179(n8). "There is no data for your selection
  • MESSAGE s064(nf) WITH sy-subrc 'LT01'. "Error & while calling transaction &
  • MESSAGE e115(n2) WITH wa_kna1-kunnr. "Customer & was changed
  • MESSAGE s259(n1me). "Material document & & posted

No longer available function modules --> are there other SAP-routines we could use or should we copy the code to Z-function group / modules or perhaps put the needed logic directly in the affect code if there not many hits and the code is short & straightforward?

  • ISH_BAPIRET2_DISPLAY
  • ISH_POPUP_TO_CONFIRM_SIMPLE
  • FORMAT_DATE_4_OUTPUT

No longer available Memory IDs --> I'm not really familiar with these, which doesn't help with deciding how best to correct the impacted code! Any suggestions of whether creating Z-Memory-IDs is an option or if something completely different has to be used in its stead?

  • FIL
  • ANZ

Any takers?

Thanks much and Cheers

Bärbel

entry.title: Re: Cloud Manual Bank Reconciliation Configuration
entry.content: without s-id, look 'way back' 😉 Configuration for Bank Statement Processing at archive.org

entry.title: Query by Bin internal process using Radio Frequency User Interface
entry.content:
Storage Bin:

A storage bin in SAP refers to a specific location within the warehouse where goods are stored. It is part of the warehouse structure and helps in organizing inventory for easy retrieval and management. SAP uses storage bins to optimize warehouse operations, ensuring efficient picking, putaway, and inventory control.

 

RFUI (Radio Frequency User Interface):


RFUI in SAP is the mobile interface used by warehouse workers to interact with the system via handheld devices. It provides real-time task instructions, such as picking, packing, and confirming activities, directly to workers on the floor. RFUI helps streamline operations and improve accuracy by reducing manual data entry.

 

Internal Process:

The internal process in SAP refers to the flow of goods and information within the warehouse, such as receiving, storing, and moving items between locations. These processes are designed to ensure that inventory is managed efficiently, and tasks are optimized. SAP supports internal processes with automation, enhancing overall operational efficiency and visibility.

  

Steps for Query by Bin internal process using Radio Frequency User Interface

 Step1:

Go to screen using the transaction code /n/scwm/rfui

Then navigate with the below process flow:

Internal processes-> 04 Stock/ Bin Query -> 01 Stock / Bin Query by Bin

 

 

 

Step2:

Provide the Storage Bin

Then click on bin detail

 

 The Bin details such as Storage type, Storage bin, Quantity and Unit of measure are displayed.

 

Conclusion:

Steps for Query by Bin internal process using Radio Frequency User Interface is provided

entry.title: How to process non-printable characters in SAP Data Services Application?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a way to exclude/replace non-printable characters with empty string?

"The first 32 characters in the ASCII-table are unprintable control codes and are used to control peripherals such as printers." and there are some under my source data.
  • ASCII table - Table of ASCII codes, characters and symbols

Thank you,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to process non-printable characters in SAP Data S...
entry.content:
Hello,

It is possible using the regex_replace function.

Example of mapping related to the column which might receive a non-printable characters:

  • regex_replace(<Input here your non-printable character/column>, '\\[\x00-\x09\x0B-\x0C\x0E-\x1F\\]', '')

For more information: regex_replace | SAP Help Portal

Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Guide to ECC to S/4HANA Migration with Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
Informative !!Thank you 

BR

Vyomakesh Racherla

entry.title: SAP B1 SDK Framework - B1Base
entry.content:
Bom dia,

Gostaria de compartilhar o framework que desenvolvi em cima do SDK do SAP B1 para acelerar o desenvolvimento, abstraindo alguns detalhes do SDK puro de forma a escrever um código mais limpo e organizado. Baseado em MVC. O mesmo já está em produção a alguns anos, tem alguns forks e 2 colaboradores.

Segue link do repositório público do mesmo: https://github.com/WilliamWachholz/B1Base

Sintam - se livres para explorar e mandar suas impressões.


Ótima semana a todos,

William Wachholz

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – New options for managing Views for filters tables and charts
entry.content:
Hello @Jocelyn_Dart, 

nice blog as always 😄 
I totally get where you coming from with the idea of restricting the creation of public variants. 
But i also agree with @wagener-mark  and @Jack_Reynolds. Giving the permission to the "Adapt UI" for everyone who should create public variants is a big challenge. The Adapt UI Feature is prone to problems if not used correctly and for customers shifting to S/4 and getting used to Fiori it's an overkill for many people. So i already see the Fiori Admins doing all the work. I dont know if this is really the best way. Sure it's not a showstopper, but regarding the acceptance it's a downgrade given that we could easily manage ALV Layouts with S_ALV_LAYO authentication object.

A report like @wagener-mark said would be awesome.

entry.title: Re: How to find CDS Views - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and S/4HANA Private Cloud.
entry.content: Hi Thank you for the blog. To me it is still unclear if it is possible to make a complete custom ABAP CDS view in eclipse ADT consume it in S4HANA Coud. Can you clearify? E.g I want to make a new sales report with alot of custom logic can that be consumed in S4hana cloud or even SAP Datasphere with a S4hana cloud connection?

entry.title: Re: Calling Email destination from CAPM service using oAu...
entry.content: You can see in the notice that the package is deprecated. Use nodemailer directly. The restrictions by Cloud SDK does not apply to nodemailer.

entry.title: Re: ALV Tress is collapsing or unexpended after selecting any checkbox.
entry.content:
People don't know your code, so the reason can be anything. If your code is very simple, there's no reason that selecting a checkbox makes collapsing the nodes.

These 3 tags altogether don't make sense: RAP, Web Dynpro, CL_GUI_ALV_GRID.

entry.title: SAC Compass - any instructions available?
entry.content:
Hi community,

its great that compass is now available in our SAC Test Tenant, I am looking forward to using it!

Is there any instructional material available at this point? I havent found any on SAC Help Portal, SAC Community, SAP Youtube or directly in SAC.

Please let me know if there is any!

Kind regards,

Eric

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for group reporting with SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office

Hello Steffen,

Can you please confirm whether or not Analysis for Office Excel add-in For S4 Public Edition still and also requires a BW or SAC licence?

If not, I am not sure to understand the above steps described to log and display reports on Excel sheets as I don't know what is the API expected value nor where access is set.

Thank you in avance,

Adrien

entry.title: Re: Inconsistency between Certification information
entry.content:
Hi @MartinezLopez 
Thank you for highlighting this.
I forwarded your inquiry to our technical experts who are currently analyzing this.
Please allow for a delay in our response.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Communicate from SAP Public Cloud to Java Application (Jco Server) via WebSocketRFC Problem
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

i am having a problem while trying to call a outbound service from the SAP Public Cloud to a external JCo WebSocketRFC Server instance. 

My JCo WebSocketRFC server is running on a VM that is exposed to the internet on port 8080.

In the SAP Public Cloud i have already configured the communication system where i have just entered the "Host Name" of my VM and set the Authentification Method in the "Users for Outbound Communication" to None since i do not need the authentification for the tests.

I have also configured a communication agreement for the communication system

On the Eclipse ADT side i have a communication scenario that looks like this:

with the corresponding outbound service

 

Now, when i try to call the outbound service from SAP Public Cloud ABAP with the corresponding code:

 

 

like described by SAP i get the following error

Anyone has an idea why this fails? Dis anyone made a scenario like this before? - to communicate from the SAP Public Cloud to a external server program? I have only found tutorials how to communicate with on prem systems.

entry.title: Re: How to retrieve quote in XML format in SAP CPQ Quote 2.0
entry.content:
@VictorG_Inycom 
you can find the XmlHelper function which exists in Quote2.0

entry.title: Consuming Gen AI models using the REST API does not work
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to use the REST APIs to interact with the Gen AI deployments as mentioned in this document,

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-ai-core/sap-ai-core-service-guide/consume-generative-ai-models-using-sap-ai-core?locale=en-US

But when I do as is explained, I am getting an error response (404 - Not found). Please see the screenshot below.

This is happening if I use the latest api-version from this SAP Note or if I simply use api-version as "latest".

Strangely it is not happening if I just put the api-version as mentioned in the documentation. 

Could someone please explain if this is intended behavior, and we should always use this api-version even if there are more updated ones available?

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Reconciliation acct (LFB1-AKONT) is a required entry field
entry.content:
Following error message receiving while saving a supplier a/c in BP.

Message No. CVI_API003

Although i have maintained recon a/c as well.

T&R

Ranjit

entry.title: User should not be able to delete the fact data from the model but able to plan the data
entry.content:
How to make sure that, user should not be able to delete the fact data.

In order to restrict user for deleting fact data, we need to disable Maintain rights in the Role for the planning model.

But if we do so, user is not able to plan the data in the model.

Is there anyway to restrict it?

entry.title: we Created ZML81N tcode for Service entry sheet while doing SES getting error Enter Plant plz prov s
entry.content:
I am created Z tcode for SER (Service Entry sheet )  ZML81N while run this t code i am getting error Enter Plant while saving what should i do help me out. 

Enter Plant

Message No. M7018

entry.title: Re: How to retrieve quote in XML format in SAP CPQ Quote 2.0
entry.content: Hello, Thanks. we already knew about that method, but unfortunately it does not shows all quote data, as we need. What we need is an analog to "Quote.GetQuoteInXML()" in Quote 2.0. Hope you can help! Cheers, Victor.

entry.title: Re: Azure Cloud Hotfolder not fetching data with WSL
entry.content: Hi, finally I ended up reinstalling the SAP upgrade along with extensions and the azure hotfolder started working correctly, maybe I did something wrong during the upgrade process but I didn't figure out what, thank you very much for your support!

entry.title: Re: How to process non-printable characters in SAP Data S...
entry.content:
Example of Job:

Let's use a File as source which contains unprintable characters generated from the Windows PowerShell:

Commands used (Windows PowerShell):

[char]0x07 | Set-Clipboard
[char]0x010 | Set-Clipboard
[char]0x013 | Set-Clipboard
[char]0x016 | Set-Clipboard
[char]0x018 | Set-Clipboard

Note: You can ignore "CF LF", since it is related to the line break.

This is how you enable the non-printable characters view under Notepad++:

In this job, the file previous mentioned will be our source and there will be a temp table as a target.
It is a simple job.

Under the Query, we will use the regex_replace function under the mapping of the desired column:

regex_replace(<input_string>, <regular expression pattern string>, <replacement string>, <regular expression processing flags>)

Link regarding the replacement string for non-printable characters ([\x00-\x09\x0B-\x0C\x0E-\x1F]): 

  • regex - How to remove what are apparently control characters in notepad++? - Super User

  • This is how you identify the non-printable characters under Notepad++:


Thank you,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Unable to create text id in sales order header and it...
entry.content:
Hello @AshishTumpally 

In CBC, you can also create new entries, and any changes made need to be transported.

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: Consuming external services(Odata/Rest) using destinations configured in BTP cockpit.
entry.content:
Hello! I am trying similar thing, as to connect to a destination.
This is my destination, it has 200 when check:

This is my xs-app.json:

{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/equipmentUpdate/?(.*)",
      "target": "/$1",
      "destination": "EquipmentUpdate",
      "authenticationType": "none"
    },
    {
        "source": "^/resources/(.*)$",
        "target": "/resources/$1",
        "authenticationType": "none",
        "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
        "source": "^/test-resources/(.*)$",
        "target": "/test-resources/$1",
        "authenticationType": "none",
        "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
        "source": "^(.*)$",
        "target": "$1",
        "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
        "authenticationType": "none"
    }
  ]
}

My mta.yaml:

_schema-version: "3.2"
ID: equipment1
version: 0.0.1
modules:
- name: equipment1-destination-content
  type: com.sap.application.content
  requires:
  - name: equipment1-destination-service
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  - name: equipment1-repo-host
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: equipment1-repo-host-key
  - name: equipment1-uaa
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: equipment1-uaa-key
  parameters:
    content:
      instance:
        destinations:
        - Name: equipment1_html_repo_host
          ServiceInstanceName: equipment1-html5-service
          ServiceKeyName: equipment1-repo-host-key
          sap.cloud.service: equipment1
        existing_destinations_policy: update
  build-parameters:
    no-source: true
- name: equipment1-app-content
  type: com.sap.application.content
  path: .
  requires:
  - name: equipment1-repo-host
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  build-parameters:
    build-result: resources
    requires:
    - artifacts:
      - equipment1.zip
      name: equipment1
      target-path: resources/
- name: equipment1
  type: html5
  path: .
  build-parameters:
    build-result: dist
    builder: custom
    commands:
    - npm install
    - npm run build:cf
    supported-platforms: []
resources:
- name: equipment1-destination-service
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    config:
      HTML5Runtime_enabled: true
      version: 1.0.0
    service: destination
    service-name: equipment1-destination-service
    service-plan: lite
- name: equipment1-uaa
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    path: ./xs-security.json
    service: xsuaa
    service-name: equipment1-xsuaa-service
    service-plan: application
- name: equipment1-repo-host
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    service: html5-apps-repo
    service-name: equipment1-html5-service
    service-plan: app-host
parameters:
  deploy_mode: html5-repo
  enable-parallel-deployments: true

My controller:

const response = await jQuery.ajax({
                    method: "GET",
                    url: "equipmentUpdate/http/equipment/DEV", 
                    headers: {
                        'Accept': '*/*'
                    }
                });

I get this response in browser console:

Sorry for long post, but maybe here is something that you see that's missing or is incorrect? I tried a bunch of things, don't know what to do next. 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: ALV Tress is collapsing or unexpended after selecting any checkbox.
entry.content:
Hello @Sandra_Rossi ,

Here I means which method is generally utilised to handle expand and collapse of tree when we do any action like selecting checkbox or other event?

entry.title: Re: First steps to work with SAP Cloud ALM Deployment scenario for SAP ABAP systems (7.40 or higher)
entry.content:
@DoloresCorrea Thank you very much for your reply.

Is it really mandatory to create VIR system? ( I mean can we create with virtual system) And just add physical production system when it’s available?

entry.title: Re: Migration cockpit - different approach shown for same...
entry.content:
The answer from iremcavusoglu is solving the issue in my case now - the note was created somewhen after my question:
 

You can visit this page: https://me.sap.com/notes/0003501633

entry.title: Re: Returns from Sales Order - In WM
entry.content: H

entry.title: How to write in ClassificationClass.classificationAttributes collection?
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm putting hands on some custom logic that uses the method de.hybris.platform.catalog.model.classification.ClassificationClassModel#getClassificationAttributes to retrieve the list of classificationAttributeModels assigned to a specific ClassificationClass (Classifying Categories tab in the backoffice), what is the right way to populate this collection? I see that the attribute is writable=false inside catalog-items.xml:

<attribute qualifier="classificationAttributes" type="ClassificationAttributeList">
						<description>list of all attributes available within this class</description>
						<modifiers read="true" write="false" search="false" optional="true"/>
						<persistence type="jalo"/>
					</attribute>

So I was wondering what was the right way to populate this the ClassificationAttributeList collection, the only way I could insert data is using forceWrite=true via impex. Has someone experienced this?

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to process non-printable characters in SAP Data S...
entry.content:
You can also use this code

 

form remove_invalid_control_chars
  changing
    text_to_strip.

  types:
    begin of control_char_list_struct,
      hex  type c,
      code type c length 3,
    end of control_char_list_struct.

  data:
    control_char_list       type table of control_char_list_struct,
    control_char_list_entry like line of control_char_list,
    test_string type string,
    white_space type string.

  white_space = cl_abap_conv_in_ce=>uccp( '0020' ).
  control_char_list = value #(
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0000' ) code = 'NUL' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0001' ) code = 'SOH' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0002' ) code = 'STX' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0003' ) code = 'ETX' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0004' ) code = 'EOT' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0005' ) code = 'ENQ' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0006' ) code = 'ACK' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0007' ) code = 'BEL' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0008' ) code = 'BS' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0009' ) code = 'HT' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '000A' ) code = 'LF' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '000B' ) code = 'VT' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '000C' ) code = 'FF' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '000D' ) code = 'CR' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '000E' ) code = 'SO' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '000F' ) code = 'SI' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0010' ) code = 'DLE' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0011' ) code = 'DC1' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0012' ) code = 'DC2' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0013' ) code = 'DC3' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0014' ) code = 'DC4' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0015' ) code = 'NAK' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0016' ) code = 'SYN' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0017' ) code = 'ETB' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0018' ) code = 'CAN' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0019' ) code = 'EM' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '001A' ) code = 'SUB' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '001B' ) code = 'ESC' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '001C' ) code = 'FS' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '001D' ) code = 'GS' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '001E' ) code = 'RS' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '001F' ) code = 'US' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '007F' ) code = 'DEL' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0080' ) code = 'PAD' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0081' ) code = 'HOP' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0082' ) code = 'BPH' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0083' ) code = 'NBH' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0084' ) code = 'IND' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0085' ) code = 'NEL' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0086' ) code = 'SSA' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0087' ) code = 'ESA' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0088' ) code = 'HTS' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0089' ) code = 'HTJ' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '008A' ) code = 'VTS' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '008B' ) code = 'PLD' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '008C' ) code = 'PLU' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '008D' ) code = 'RI' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '008E' ) code = 'SS2' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '008F' ) code = 'SS3' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0090' ) code = 'DCS' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0091' ) code = 'PU1' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0092' ) code = 'PU2' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0093' ) code = 'STS' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0094' ) code = 'CCH' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0095' ) code = 'MW' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0096' ) code = 'SPA' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0097' ) code = 'EPA' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0098' ) code = 'SOS' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '0099' ) code = 'SGCI' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '009A' ) code = 'SCI' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '009B' ) code = 'CSI' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '009C' ) code = 'ST' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '009D' ) code = 'OSC' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '009E' ) code = 'PM' )
    ( hex = CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE=>uccp( '009F' ) code = 'APC' )
  ).

  loop at control_char_list into control_char_list_entry.
    replace all occurrences of control_char_list_entry-hex in text_to_strip with white_space.
  endloop.
endform.

 

Call the function with a text and you get the special chars replaced with a white space.

If you need to have \r and \n included in your text you can comment out the LF and CR entries.

entry.title: Destination usage in SAP BAS.
entry.content:
Hello!
I am trying to make a connection to a destination via SAP BAS app, that's a SAP FSM extension. Currently I can't trigger my destinations URL.
My destination:

This is my xs-app.json:

 

 

{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/equipmentUpdate/?(.*)",
      "target": "/$1",
      "destination": "EquipmentUpdate",
      "authenticationType": "none"
    },
    {
        "source": "^/resources/(.*)$",
        "target": "/resources/$1",
        "authenticationType": "none",
        "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
        "source": "^/test-resources/(.*)$",
        "target": "/test-resources/$1",
        "authenticationType": "none",
        "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
        "source": "^(.*)$",
        "target": "$1",
        "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
        "authenticationType": "none"
    }
  ]
}

 

 

My mta.yaml:

 

 

_schema-version: "3.2"
ID: equipment1
version: 0.0.1
modules:
- name: equipment1-destination-content
  type: com.sap.application.content
  requires:
  - name: equipment1-destination-service
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  - name: equipment1-repo-host
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: equipment1-repo-host-key
  - name: equipment1-uaa
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: equipment1-uaa-key
  parameters:
    content:
      instance:
        destinations:
        - Name: equipment1_html_repo_host
          ServiceInstanceName: equipment1-html5-service
          ServiceKeyName: equipment1-repo-host-key
          sap.cloud.service: equipment1
        existing_destinations_policy: update
  build-parameters:
    no-source: true
- name: equipment1-app-content
  type: com.sap.application.content
  path: .
  requires:
  - name: equipment1-repo-host
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  build-parameters:
    build-result: resources
    requires:
    - artifacts:
      - equipment1.zip
      name: equipment1
      target-path: resources/
- name: equipment1
  type: html5
  path: .
  build-parameters:
    build-result: dist
    builder: custom
    commands:
    - npm install
    - npm run build:cf
    supported-platforms: []
resources:
- name: equipment1-destination-service
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    config:
      HTML5Runtime_enabled: true
      version: 1.0.0
    service: destination
    service-name: equipment1-destination-service
    service-plan: lite
- name: equipment1-uaa
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    path: ./xs-security.json
    service: xsuaa
    service-name: equipment1-xsuaa-service
    service-plan: application
- name: equipment1-repo-host
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    service: html5-apps-repo
    service-name: equipment1-html5-service
    service-plan: app-host
parameters:
  deploy_mode: html5-repo
  enable-parallel-deployments: true

 

 

My controllers function for destination call:

 

 

const response = await jQuery.ajax({
                    method: "GET",
                    url: "equipmentUpdate/http/equipment/DEV", 
                    headers: {
                        'Accept': '*/*'
                    }
                });

 

 

I get this response in browser console:

Maybe there is something that is missing or is incorrect?

I tried a bunch of things from blogs and videos but don't know what to do next. It looks like it's getting close to my integration flow but still far enough. 

Thanks! 

Regards,

Ervins

entry.title: Re: Finished Good costing for projects with revenue - S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Partial Delivery Qty assignment during Wave Creation
entry.content:
Hi,

Client needs to handle partial delivery quantities using a Wave. They use a third-party tool to determine the quantity they can manage, which will interface with EWM and create a Wave for picking within EWM.

From my research, I couldn't find a custom solution to create a wave using partial delivery quantities. I know about Process Codes, but the client prefers not to modify the delivery itself, only during wave assignment. Is this technically feasible?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Revealing Hidden SAP Business Network Configurations: Insights for Delivery Consultants
entry.content: This would be helpful to many. Thanks @Prem_Tracz!

entry.title: Re: ALV Tress is collapsing or unexpended after selecting any checkbox.
entry.content: There are many methods, function modules (and more) to display an ALV tree.

entry.title: RBP: How to deal with changing assignment of positions - job codes
entry.content:
We are looking for some best practice guidance on RBP tied to positions and job codes.  Our team does not have much experience with clients controlling RBP at the position/job code level.  Forvia is running into issues.

 

Here is the problem:
When HR users get access to SF, it's tied to their position. This works well for managing access - when someone leaves or changes positions, their access is automatically removed. The new person who takes over that position automatically gets the same access.

But there's a catch: If the job code or scope of the position changes later, the automatic permissions might not match what the role actually needs anymore. This means people could end up with incorrect access levels.

 

Is there any best practice or suggestion on how to handle this?  Have you seen this before with other clients and if so, how do they approach it?  Can we setup an alert? Is there any solution we can put into place?

entry.title: Approval workflow sales private cloud: No feedback to user when sales order has been approved
entry.content: Our users expect to have a feedback when sales quotation WS02000447 or sales order WS02000006 has been approved by approver. But currently, we don't have any push message or workflow received back. Does anyone have the same issue? Workflow works in case of "rework needed" . Thanks in advance. BR Angela

entry.title: Nova Access Code 'NOVATO' – Join Early Access Today!
entry.content: Join Nova today using the access code 'NOVATO' and get exclusive early access to the platform. Simply copy and paste the code into the Nova bot to get started and unlock all the early benefits. This is your chance to be among the first to explore Nova’s features and make the most of what it offers. Don’t miss out—sign up now and be part of the exciting early access community!

entry.title: How to create new cost centers categories in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Can you advise how to create new cost centers categories in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to create new cost centers categories in SAP S/4H...
entry.content:
Hello,

New cost centers categories can be added via the configuration - Define Cost Center Categories

The SSCUI is - 102498

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP SQL Anywhere RESTORE with RENAME - What is the correct script for restoring database
entry.content: As Volker pointed out more directly, I would recommend IMAGE backups. That said, I do not think that the backup is involved in this error. The database should be able to start even if missing a dbspace.

entry.title: Re: Passing values in Input Parameters - Variables of Datasphere Model from Power BI
entry.content:
@Jinal_Patel 

I found a problem...

A Single Analytic model is deployed as multiple column view in the database:

1) A column View with base fact fields -> that can be read from DB users.

2) A column view for every associated dimension. -> that can not be read from DB users.

3) A final column view (Fact join Dimensions). -> that can not be read from DB users.

example with a database analysis user (read all permission).

Example with a DB User created inside a space (2 and 3 are missing!!):

entry.title: Re: Passing values in Input Parameters - Variables of Datasphere Model from Power BI
entry.content:
Hello @Jinal_Patel ,

I confirm that now I can read Analytic Model through DB users but with limitations.

I ask to SAP to update the official Datasphere documentation here https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/43509d67b8b84e66a30851e832f66911/4db6f5a329af44509ae422ad707877b2.html?locale=en-US.

As is not mentioned anywhere unless this note https://me.sap.com/notes/3416339/E

entry.title: Re: How to crearte a segmentation in SAP Marketing Cloud...
entry.content:
Use the field "Communication Medium Opt-In" with the value EMAIL instead.

If you use the transaction type, you can select contacts who did an opt-out once, but did an opt-in later again.

entry.title: Re: Multiple values not getting retained in List UIBB in BP.
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check if roundtrip is configured for the custom UIBB.

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Re: SAP SQL Anywhere RESTORE with RENAME - What is the correct script for restoring database
entry.content:
Hello, Colleagues! I confirm that there are certain requirements to use ARCHIVE BACKUPS.
So, Please, help me to resolve this issue; I already spent some time, but I didn't find any useful information
SAP SQL Anywhere

entry.title: Re: How to crearte a segmentation in SAP Marketing Cloud...
entry.content: I want Opt Out users. Could you please suggest a filter that will only give me Email Opt Out users.

entry.title: How to Start on LayerEdge with the Іnvite cоde 'E3B8esvO'
entry.content: Getting started with LayerEdge is easy! Simply use the Іnvite cоde 'E3B8esvO' during sign-up to unlock points and access the platform’s tools. You don’t need to install anything—just click to run a node directly from your browser. This simple setup allows you to dive right into the platform and start exploring. Sign up today and make the most of the benefits available with this Іnvite cоde!

entry.title: Re: Consuming Gen AI models using the REST API does not work
entry.content:
HI @essay88 

First thing you need to confirm deployment id(********) is running in your AI Core Console and if its running.. can you check in Postman headers if this both is inculded while making Post call..

Authorization : Bearer <token>

AI-Resource-Group : default


you can find the details in last part of the blog which helps to fix your issue
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/set-up-sap-generative-ai-hub-in-an-sap-btp-enterprise-account-and-consume/ba-p/13624287

AI Core APIs
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/leveraging-sap-ai-core-apis-to-build-your-own-ai-powered-apps/ba-p/13718456

entry.title: Re: Failed to execute 'send' on 'XMLHttpRequest'
entry.content:
Hello Jace,

did you manage to solve this problem? We are having it too.

Thank you,

Giuseppe

entry.title: Re: gCTS is here
entry.content:
Hi,

the tool to develop UI5 would be the Business Application Studio. You can find an introduction in this tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/group.sapui5-cf-bas.html 

You can also find more information in this blog post BAS->ABAP Repository Deployment: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/working-with-github-in-sap-business-application-studio-next-generation-of/ba-p/13466952.

Kind regards
Karin

entry.title: Re: How to crearte a segmentation in SAP Marketing Cloud...
entry.content: Ooh... Then I would combine the two: On the one hand, those with an interaction type MKT_OPT_OUT, and then Exclude those with "Communication Medium Opt-In" on EMAIL

entry.title: Is link alias not available for interaction segmentation?
entry.content:
Hi,

In contact-based segmentation, there is an attribute "Text of Launch URL" that gives the description/alias of a clicked link in an email.

In interaction-based segmentation, I only seem to find "Launch URL", which is the whole url with https and GA tags and different per language...

Am I just not looking correctly, or is there no field available in interaction-segmentation that is the equivalent of "Text of Launch URL" in contact-segmentation? 

Thanks if someone can confirm this.

entry.title: ILX - entity images -> not logical mapping ?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am preparing to roll-out ILX to our Learners.
Some time ago, SAP replaced the Entity icons with new images (a bit too generic for me)

I can update these : LMS Admin / System Admin / Application Admin / Images.
In the Images section, I can replace these images for each Entity type.

What is entity type here, as it is not matching the Entity list nor Item Types ?
          I would have loved this to match my Item Types, as this would be a consistent logic for the learners.

Finally, I updated them all this morning, and all works in the ILX page, but only some did update in the catalog/library view.

What did you folks out there do  ?
Did you add your own images ?

Thanks,

Kris

entry.title: Re: Combining Multiple Wildcard Searches in Same Report
entry.content:
You are not looking for a row that matches all of those patterns so just add each of your conditions with an OR instead of an AND.  There is no reason to group them.  You want:

   Inventorynumber matches pattern "AB%"
OR Inventorynumber matches pattern "CD%"
OR inventorynumber matches pattern "EF%%"

entry.title: Re: how to get count of a name that is appearing multiple times in a column
entry.content:
can you share an example xls file with data - can be any data as long as it ties in to your requirement.
I can provide a couple of solutions, but not fully clear on the ask.

entry.title: Retail, Fashion and Vertical Business in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
1. General Availability (2502)

SAP is proud to announce the general availability of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, retail, fashion, and vertical business solution, marking a pivotal step forward in delivering tailored enterprise resource planning (ERP) capabilities for retailers of all sizes. Built specifically to address the complexities of the retail industry, this solution enables seamless end-to-end integration of processes, providing the operational agility required in today’s fast-paced retail environment.

Retailers have often been constrained by fragmented solutions that excel in isolated areas but fail to deliver the integrated experience needed for cohesive retail operations. The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition bridges this gap by offering an ERP system designed with retail-specific capabilities to support merchandising, store operations, and complex supply chain management.

Built on the flexibility of public cloud architecture, the platform combines industry-specific processes, unified data, and embedded AI, ensuring a comprehensive suite of tools for finance, procurement, merchandising, and customer experience management. This new offering provides retailers with the tools to streamline processes, deliver personalized experiences, and drive sustainable growth, all while leveraging out-of-the-box integrations for faster time to value. With SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, retailers can now achieve the agility and innovation needed to thrive in today’s digitally driven marketplace.

 

2. Solution Overview

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, retail, fashion, and vertical business provides comprehensive end-to-end process coverage, ensuring seamless operations across all roles and functions within a retail enterprise. This solution integrates key areas such as master data management, pricing and promotions, demand and supply planning, procurement, supply chain management, store commerce, and sales. For example, it enables master data specialists to manage assortments and product taxonomies while providing merchandise planners with tools for pricing and promotion strategies. Additionally, purchasers and supply chain specialists benefit from streamlined procurement and inventory management processes, including inbound and outbound logistics. Store associates and managers can handle in-store inventory, customer orders, and connectivity with ease, ensuring an efficient store-level operation. The solution also supports billing clerks in managing accounts receivable and sales processes, including omnichannel order fulfillment. With optional capabilities like retail logistics with third-party warehouses and seasonal planning, SAP S/4HANA Cloud delivers a flexible, scalable platform to drive operational efficiency, enhance customer experiences, and support strategic growth for retailers.

 

3. Roadmap & Localization:

Full Roadmap for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, retail, fashion, and vertical business: SAP Road Map Explorer

In 2025, the feature roadmap for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, retail, fashion, and vertical business highlights significant advancements designed to empower retailers with enhanced capabilities. Release 2502 includes features such as fast and intuitive order capturing via simplified Fiori apps, in-store merchandise management enhancements, rapid replenishment improvements, and advanced integrations with industry cloud applications for real-time inventory synchronization. It also introduces flexible business roles, granular authorization capabilities, and value-added services for foundational retail operations.

Looking ahead to Release 2508, the roadmap emphasizes enabling AI-driven insights and extensibility, including support for hybrid orders, enhanced assortment management with AI co-pilot integration, and advanced intercompany sales and stock transfers. These developments reflect SAP's focus on equipping retailers with tools to streamline processes, improve operational efficiency, and meet evolving customer expectations.

 

The localization roadmap for SAP S/4HANA Cloud ensures the solution's global relevance by expanding its availability to key markets. The 2502 release supports localization as a self-service in ten additional countries, including India, Australia, Mexico, Singapore, the UK, and Belgium, among others. This builds on the already robust localization support in markets such as Germany, France, the US, and Canada. The roadmap for future releases plans to further broaden the geographic reach, targeting additional countries in Europe, Asia, and South America. By addressing local tax, legal, and market-specific requirements, SAP S/4HANA Cloud ensures retailers worldwide can leverage its capabilities with confidence, fostering global adoption and operational consistency.

 

 4. 2502 Release Highlights

 

Fast and Easy Sales Order Capturing in Stores

Customers buying high-value goods from a retail store need an invoice for warranty or return purpose. Also they want to pay and pick-up the goods immediately or visit the store later for pick-up. Store Associate needs a very simple app to capture articles, calculate the total price and complete the transaction including goods movement in the system , in a very short time. Mange In-store sales order app provides the feature of single click generation of logistic documents.

Value Proposition:

  • Quickly and intuitively meet customers' requests in the stores
  • Support the sales order process for goods that need to be procured from a distribution center or a supplier, which is a must for the segments consumer electronics, DIY (do-it-yourself), specialty retail, or fashion retail
  • Increase customer retention and revenue

Capabilities:

  • Streamlined user interface for fast and intuitive maintenance
  • Determination of order type, sales organization, and distribution channel
  • Determination of the store
  • Display of the gross price at the header and item levels
  • Follow-on document creation in one click

For more information, see: Manage In-store Sales Orders

 

Efficient Assortment Management and Listing

Assortments are collections of articles for the purpose of defining which articles are relevant for which sites (stores and DCs). In particular, they are required to check whether an article can be procured by a site. In addition, assortments play an important role in other processes like Point of Sale outbound communication.

Assortments can be defined in terms of assortment modules that serve as article containers, which then are assigned to sites. As a result of listing assortment information is made available for operational usage in procurement. Analysis capabilities enriched by KPIs provide the needed transparency which articles are allocated to which sites, and serve as the basis for decision making processes. 

Value Proposition:

  • Enhance revenue streams by strategically curating assortments
  • Reduce operations costs by providing store managers correct information on what articles they are allowed to order, store and sell
  • Streamline the process of assigning articles to assortments
  • Assure optimal product placement across stores and distribution centers while minimizing markdowns and write-offs

Capabilities:

  • Elaborate assortment analyses to make sure the right articles are allocated to the right locations
  • Insights into KPIs with a user-friendly interface
  • APIs for events, assortments maintenance and DC listing

For more information, see: Assortment Planning and Management

 

Enhancements of In-Store Apps

The way how store associates and managers execute relevant processes differs significantly from employees working in the headquarters. Complex user interfaces are not an option for in-store processes because of costly trainings, enforced by high fluctuation rates of store personnel. The in-store Fiori apps are user friendly, self-explanatory and streamlined for in-store processes. It enables store associates to: 

  • Transfer article (from store to store/distribution center)
  • Perform a planned or unplanned physical inventory count
  • Adjust the stock quantity for different reasons such as shrinkage, damage

Value Proposition:

  • Streamline store operations for all article types
  • Support retailers of segments that require any of the specific article types listed below
  • Reduce inventory carrying cost by efficiently managing inventory and stock movements to reduce obsolescence and shrinkage costs

Capabilities:

  • Enhancing in-store apps to enable comprehensive support for:
  • Full articles with assigned empty articles (typically to handle deposits)
  • Structured articles, such as sales sets
  • Weight articles, for which the base unit of measure is weight

For more information, see: In-Store Merchandise and Inventory Management

 

Value-Added Services for Fashion Retailers

In some scenarios it is required to associate additional activities to the actual product as part of the buying or selling process. That can either be physical products (like a hanger for a coat, or a price label), or services (like ironing, or special packaging). These are called value-added services (VAS), as they increase the value of the product for the recipient.

Relevant VAS information can be created in master data maintenance.
During order processing, VAS related information can be entered in the respective document (purchase order, stock transfer order, and sales order). From there, VAS information is then transferred to the follow-on documents, such as outbound delivery, inbound delivery. This enables personnel (for example a warehouse clerk) to carry out the special tasks needed before delivering the goods to the recipient.

Value Proposition:

  • Increases the value of the delivered merchandise for the goods recipient by including necessary services
  • Enhance operational efficiency by providing needed information to personnel so specific tasks can be executed

Capabilities:

  • Maintenance of value-added services
  • Definition and maintenance of VAS information in operational documents, such as purchase order, stock transfer order, sales order
  • Availability of VAS information in logistic execution documents, such as inbound and outbound deliveries, to enable personnel to execute the needed tasks

For more information, see Value-Added Services Management

 

5. Further Information

  • Official product page: SAP website | Partner portal
  • Full retail solution processes: Process Navigator – SAP for Me
  • Product assistance on SAP Help
  • Learning journey: Exploring SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, retail, fashion and vertical business
  • End-2-End Retail Demo: Interactive Value Journey
  • Partner portal:
  • Hands-on Tutorial: Content Discovery -  E2E Retail Demos

 

📽️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!   

Between January 21 and January 24, we conducted a series of 21 engaging live sessions to showcase the thrilling innovations included in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. If you missed the live sessions, don't worry! You can still access the whole series or select the sessions that interest you the most. Seize this opportunity to watch them on demand at your convenience–anywhere, anytime.  

  

🔎Find All of Our Assets   

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: RAP - ListReport - Create button not appearing on LineItems
entry.content:
Hi, I have created a RAP framework and managed behavior implementation. I have chosen ListReport template for transactional app generation. 

Create/Update/Delete all fine with root node, but can't see "Create" button for child/Items. Could you please help here. attached the screenshot.

entry.title: Re: Failed to execute 'send' on 'XMLHttpRequest'
entry.content: no, I've opened the ticket for our dev support and waiting for respond. I let You know if they figoure out it.

entry.title: Re: How to create external users in SAP LMS?
entry.content: @lilymar, it'd be possible to follow the Setting Up SAP SuccessFactors Learning with Identity Authentication and Identity Provisioning Services documentation to implement Learning only users with IAS/IPS.

entry.title: Re: Grouping and Subtotal in Fiori Elements List report u...
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake,

Yes I have maintained 

@Aggregation.default: #SUM

MyField,

But still no luck .Even Grouping is not appearing when I run the application. Getting the same error as I described above.

entry.title: Outbound EDI Customer Invoice SupplierPartyID inconsistency
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have configured the "Customer Invoice - Send (B2B)" API to send EDI messages when a customer invoice is completed. (https://api.sap.com/api/CO_EDI_INVOICE_REQUEST_OUT/resource)

The message is sent but there are inconsistency in it, in the "Party" nodes.

Example:

For example, my billing document has those Business Partners:

==>The Sold-to, Bill-to and Payer is the customer: "Client FR 1 (CUSTFR1)"

The Supplier is the Company (FR10).

Outbound message:

The "SupplierPartyIDs I receive in the outbound message in the Party part is:

 

    <Party PartyType="BillFrom">
      <SupplierPartyID>CUSTFR1</SupplierPartyID>
      ...
    </Party>
    <Party PartyType="SoldTo">
      <SupplierPartyID>CUSTFR1</SupplierPartyID>
      ...
    </Party>
    <Party PartyType="BillTo">
      <SupplierPartyID>CUSTFR1</SupplierPartyID>
      ...
    </Party>
    <Party PartyType="Payer">
      <SupplierPartyID>CUSTFR1</SupplierPartyID>
      ...
    </Party>
    <Party PartyType="ShipTo">
      <SupplierPartyID>CUSTFR1</SupplierPartyID>
      ...
    </Party>

 

All SupplierPartyIDs are the customer's, but the BillFrom type Party's should be the company's.

 

I think it may be something missing in the configuration, but I don't know what. 

Has someone an idea of what can be missing ?

 

Thank you for your help,

Marion Marolany

entry.title: Unable to Block or Delete the Service Agent who is Also an Internal Employee
entry.content:
Unable to block or delete a Service Agent since he/she is also an Internal Employee. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to Block or Delete the Service Agent who is Al...
entry.content:
It is not possible to block a service agent as there is no specific role and an internal employee always needs to be active until he/she gets terminated in Personnel Administration work center. So if an Employee has been in any point of time an internal Employee, the status of the Business Partner cannot be changed.

The status is persisted at business partner level and there is no business partner role specific status.

If the same Business Partner instance is an internal and external Employee at once, the status can't be changed anymore. The reason is that for internal Employees the status has to be always = 'Active'.

Special Case: The Service Agent is Active even after the Internal Employee is Terminated

Even though you have terminated the employee in Personnel Administration work center, the respective Business Partner remains Active because as per definition, a business partner can be used for other roles like Account, Suppliers, etc. Blocking a Business Partner while terminating an employee will result in inconsistency, if the Business partner is used in any other Business transaction document (for example: sales order, purchase order).

Although the Employee is terminated, the system only allows the status active for internal Employees. The reason for this design is consumer of internal Employees (Rehire Employee, Employee OWL, Change workplace address, Change Private Address, etc.) counting on this system behavior. Hence, it is not possible to block/Obsolete a Business Partner which is an Internal Employee (Active or Terminated).

In cases, if the Business partner has only Service Agent role, you can block the status manually in the Business Partner Data work center by using Change Status. So if a Service Agent has been in any point of time an internal Employee, the status cannot be changed.

You can also refer to KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/1645825

entry.title: LayerEdge: What It Is and How to Use the Іnvite cоde 'E3B8esvO'
entry.content: LayerEdge is a versatile platform that provides access to powerful tools and features. By signing up with the Іnvite cоde 'E3B8esvO', you can easily get started and unlock points for future use. The process is simple—there's no need for installations, just click to run a node directly from your browser. It’s an easy way to dive into the platform and start exploring its benefits. Join today and experience everything LayerEdge has to offer!
